title: Tell time to hour or half hour
description: Practice telling time on analog clocks to the hour or half hour.
topic_path: Tell time to hour or half hour

assessment_items.question_content:
**What time is it?**

The time is [[☃ numeric-input 3]] : [[☃ numeric-input 4]] $\text{ a.m.}$

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9c8d3033ac5d811664ffa5cfb04f48058fc2927d)
hints: The small hand is for the hour, and the big hand is for the minutes.

The hour hand is between $8$ and $9$, so it is after $8$ o'clock but not yet $9$ o'clock.  
The hour is $8$.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f4a9b48ad64431989e9b3bfebd145205fe193b2c)
The minute hand starts pointing straight up for $0$ minutes.  Over an hour, it travels a full circle, or $60$ minutes.

On the clock shown, the minute hand has traveled halfway around the circle, or $30$ minutes.  So, it is half past $8$, or $8{:}30$.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/43200c9a07f3fd73888961707d5438020b2306dd)
The time is $8{:}30 \text { a.m.}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**What time is it?**

The time is [[☃ numeric-input 3]] : [[☃ numeric-input 4]] $\text{ p.m.}$

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8f89bb8892e6a4891d9ea86891a0c793d9a1917f)
hints: The small hand is for the hour, and the big hand is for the minutes.

The hour hand is pointing at $12$, so the hour is $12$.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/860eadce0cbd0bcd5cebae870f1e928c7cbaa6e5)
The minute hand starts pointing straight up for $0$ minutes.

The minute hand is pointing straight up at $12$, so it is $0$ minutes past $12$.

 ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3a8d6f99b7bb8fe9dcfa75e9d23133d561f62a3e)
The time is $12{:}00 \text { p.m.}$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which clock shows $2{:}30$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The small hand is for the hour, and the big hand is for the minutes.

At $\greenD{2}{:}\blueD{30}$, the $\greenD{\text{hour hand}}$ is halfway between $\greenD{2}$ and $3$.

![A clock shows the short hour hand is halfway between 2 and 3.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9ec55edc9a5dbb4a6b71943564a820a510bfa288)

At $\greenD{2}{:}\blueD{30}$, the $\blueD{\text{minute hand}}$ is $\blueD{\text{half way}}$ around the clock at the $\blueD6$.
  
![A clock shows the short hour hand is halfway between 2 and 3. The long minute hand
points to 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8119d72499d1dbe4af0ba7ce1f231539512bfb2e)

This clock shows $2{:}30$.

![A clock shows the short hour hand is halfway between 2 and 3. The long minute hand points to 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/81bdb03ed466a9ae293e439c5bdc7f67c4160598)

choices.content:
![A clock shows the short hour hand is halfway between 2 and 3. The long minute hand
points to 6.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/81bdb03ed466a9ae293e439c5bdc7f67c4160598)

![A clock shows the short hour hand is at 2. The long minute hand
points to 12.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b50c2bbe6a77b320be1a6e31a8145cf7ec15bc09)

At $\greenD{6}{:}\blueD{00}$, the $\blueD{\text{minute hand}}$ is facing straight up at the $\blueD{12}$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which clock shows half past $11$ o'clock?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Half past $11$ o'clock is half way between $11{:}00$ and $12{:}00$.  

So, half past $11$ o'clock is $11{:}30$.

Which clock shows $11{:}30$?

The small hand is for the hour, and the big hand is for the minutes.

At $\greenD{11}{:}\blueD{30}$, the $\greenD{\text{hour hand}}$ is halfway between $\greenD{11}$ and $12$.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0c8749a59f564651ccf806cbace93646b8a81b50)

At $\greenD{11}{:}\blueD{30}$, the $\blueD{\text{minute hand}}$ is $\blueD{\text{half way}}$ around the clock at the $\blueD6$.
  
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6bdeb57875c25b5704e1fbd1adae75b40ef52c13)

This clock shows half past $11$ o'clock.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e94e63962b3d5b797b366ff6d18295ba6fb865cb)

choices.content: ![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/74e79b9ebe955f385c1b68d361372e16fc4ee997)
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e94e63962b3d5b797b366ff6d18295ba6fb865cb)
